section.heading: Authorization of appropriation for Delmarva Peninsula study

content.p: There is hereby authorized to be appropriated the sum of $500,000 to carry out the provisions of sections 1962d–7 to 1962d–11 of this title: Provided, That nothing in such sections shall prevent the expenditure of other funds appropriated to the United States Geological Survey for studies and activities performed under its general authority.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was not enacted as part of the Water Resources Planning Act which comprises this chapter.

note.heading: Change of Name
note.p: “United States Geological Survey” substituted in text for “Geological Survey” pursuant to provision of title I of Pub. L. 102–154, set out as a note under section 31 of Title 43, Public Lands.
